codeReview.summary: Factory and Kimi changes align with the feature intent, but the Codex mixed cumulative/delta change introduces a blocking edge-case regression where placeholder/partial token_count payloads can zero out totals and suppress valid delta parsing.

issues.description: parseCodexSessionJSONL now treats any non-nil result from codexCumulativeTotalsFromTokenCountInfo as authoritative cumulative data and sets foundCumulative=true, then skips deltas at line 824. Because codexCumulativeTotalsFromTokenCountInfo returns (0,0,0) for any token_count map (TokenExtractionUtility.swift:524-528) even when input/output fields are absent, partial or placeholder token_count events can suppress last_token_usage accumulation and produce zero/empty usage rows.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The token-accounting-worker procedure requires TDD red/green and reading .factory/library/user-testing.md, but this run edited parser code directly and added no tests while handoff.skillFeedback still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff commit 8795892 changes only 3 parser files (no tests). Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 5f8b570b-7aec-4bf8-b686-466e14c864be shows no user-testing.md read and no failing-test-first cycle before edits.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Swift app linting command is not represented in services.yaml even though workers run swiftlint for parser/app changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows command `swiftlint lint --strict ...`; .factory/services.yaml defines lint only as `npm --prefix extensions/openburnbar run lint`.

summary: Reviewed feature m2-provider-specific-exact-first-parsers on commit 8795892d711213726f115e27d5eef1b991d9e78f, including handoff, transcript skeleton, and diff. Found one blocking Codex parser regression in mixed/partial token_count handling, so the feature review fails pending fix.
